title: Introduction to One Drop of Body Fluid - PCR (1DF-PCR)
author: Kuo-Ping Chiu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: It is an attractive idea to make a single drop of blood sufficient for the diagnosis of many diseases. This was exactly what the biotech company Theranos Inc., founded in 2003 by a 19-year-old girl, Elizabeth Holmes, claimed. Unfortunately, their health technology turned out to be a fraud, and Elizabeth was charged by the U.S.
steps_raw: It is an attractive idea to make a single drop of blood sufficient for the diagnosis of many diseases. This was exactly what the biotech company Theranos Inc., founded in 2003 by a 19-year-old girl, Elizabeth Holmes, claimed. Unfortunately, their health technology turned out to be a fraud, and Elizabeth was charged by the U.S.
